member.name: T:Lpdf.EncryptPermissions
member.summary: PDF permission flags for RC4-128 encryption. All flags default to true (allowed); set to false to restrict.

member.name: P:Lpdf.EncryptPermissions.Print
member.summary: Allow printing. Set to false to disable printing in viewers.

member.name: P:Lpdf.EncryptPermissions.Modify
member.summary: Allow content modification. Set to false to block edits.

member.name: P:Lpdf.EncryptPermissions.Copy
member.summary: Allow text and graphic extraction. Set to false to block copying.

member.name: P:Lpdf.EncryptPermissions.Annotate
member.summary: Allow adding or modifying annotations. Set to false to block annotations.

member.name: P:Lpdf.EncryptPermissions.FillForms
member.summary: Allow form field filling. Set to false to disable form input.

member.name: P:Lpdf.EncryptPermissions.Accessibility
member.summary: Allow accessibility tools (screen readers). Set to false to restrict.

member.name: P:Lpdf.EncryptPermissions.Assemble
member.summary: Allow page insertion, deletion, and rotation. Set to false to block assembly.

member.name: P:Lpdf.EncryptPermissions.PrintHq
member.summary: Allow high-quality printing. Set to false to degrade print resolution.

member.name: T:Lpdf.EncryptOptions
member.summary: RC4-128 encryption options passed to .

member.name: P:Lpdf.EncryptOptions.UserPassword
member.summary: Open password shown to readers. Empty string = no open password required.

member.name: P:Lpdf.EncryptOptions.OwnerPassword
member.summary: Owner (permissions) password. Required; must be non-empty.

member.name: P:Lpdf.EncryptOptions.Permissions
member.summary: Permission flags applied to the document.

member.name: T:Lpdf.RenderOptions
member.summary: Options shared across multiple calls.

member.name: P:Lpdf.RenderOptions.FontBytes
member.summary: Pre-loaded font bytes for custom fonts referenced via fonts src="…". Keys are the font token names used in the document; values are raw TTF/OTF bytes.

member.name: P:Lpdf.RenderOptions.ImageBytes
member.summary: Pre-loaded image bytes for images referenced via . Keys are the image names declared in ; values are raw PNG/JPEG bytes.

member.name: P:Lpdf.RenderOptions.SrcFallback
member.summary: File-read callback for resolving font src paths at render time. On the server this can be set to System.IO.File.ReadAllBytes. In sandboxed environments supply all bytes via .

member.name: P:Lpdf.RenderOptions.CreatedOn
member.summary: Optional ISO 8601 creation timestamp (e.g. "2024-06-01T12:00:00"). When provided, written as /CreationDate in the PDF info dictionary. Omitting this keeps builds reproducible (no embedded timestamp).

member.name: T:Lpdf.LpdfEngine
member.summary: Stateful lpdf renderer. Construct once with a license key; call or as many times as needed.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfEngine.#ctor(System.String,Lpdf.RenderOptions)
member.param: Your lpdf license key. Pass an empty string to render in evaluation mode (produces a visible watermark).
Shared render options applied to every call.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfEngine.SetEncryption(Lpdf.EncryptOptions)
member.summary: Configure RC4-128 encryption for all subsequent calls. Pass to clear previously set encryption.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfEngine.LoadFont(System.String,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Register raw TTF/OTF bytes for a font name referenced via fonts src="…". Call before . Returns this.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfEngine.LoadImage(System.String,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Register raw PNG or JPEG bytes for an image name referenced via . Call before . Returns this.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfEngine.RenderPdf(System.String,Lpdf.RenderOptions)
member.summary: Render an lpdf XML string to PDF bytes.
member.param: Per-call overrides merged with the constructor options.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfEngine.RenderPdf(Lpdf.LpdfDocument,Lpdf.RenderOptions)
member.summary: Render an tree (built with ) to PDF bytes.
member.param: Per-call overrides merged with the constructor options.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfEngine.KitToXml(Lpdf.LpdfDocument)
member.summary: Convert an tree (built with ) to an lpdf XML string.
member.remarks: The serialisation is performed by the Rust core running as a WASI subprocess, so the output is identical to the XML produced by the other adapters.
member.returns: A well-formed XML string with an <?xml ...?> declaration.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfEngine.Dispose
member.summary: Releases the WASM runtime resources held by this engine.

member.name: T:Lpdf.LpdfRenderException
member.summary: Thrown when the lpdf engine returns a layout or parse error.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfRenderException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Thrown when the lpdf engine returns a layout or parse error.

member.name: T:Lpdf.LpdfKit
M:Lpdf.LpdfKit.Stack(Lpdf.StackInput)
member.summary: Build a stack layout node (vertical column).

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfKit.Flank(Lpdf.FlankInput)
member.summary: Build a flank layout node (horizontal row).

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfKit.Split(Lpdf.SplitInput)
member.summary: Build a split layout node (two-column split).

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfKit.Cluster(Lpdf.ClusterInput)
member.summary: Build a cluster layout node (wrapping flex row).

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfKit.Grid(Lpdf.GridInput)
member.summary: Build a grid layout node (multi-column grid).

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfKit.Frame(Lpdf.FrameInput)
member.summary: Build a frame layout node (fixed-size container).

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfKit.Link(Lpdf.LinkInput)
member.summary: Build a link layout node (hyperlink wrapper).

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfKit.Divider(Lpdf.DividerInput)
member.summary: Build a divider horizontal rule node.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfKit.Img(Lpdf.ImgInput)
member.summary: Build an img image node.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfKit.Barcode(Lpdf.BarcodeInput)
member.summary: Build a barcode node.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfKit.Table(Lpdf.TableInput)
member.summary: Build a table layout node.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfKit.Thead(Lpdf.TheadInput)
member.summary: Build a thead table header row group.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfKit.Tr(Lpdf.TrInput)
member.summary: Build a tr table row.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfKit.Td(Lpdf.TdInput)
member.summary: Build a td table cell.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfKit.Text(Lpdf.TextInput)
member.summary: Build a text paragraph node.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfKit.Span(Lpdf.SpanInput)
member.summary: Build a span inline node.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfKit.Page(Lpdf.PageInput)
member.summary: Build a page node.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfKit.Document(Lpdf.DocumentInput)
member.summary: Build the root document node, ready for .

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfKit.Text(System.String)
member.summary: Wrap a plain string as for use in .

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfKit.Attrs(System.Object)
member.summary: Reflect over any options record and convert its non-null properties to a kebab-case attribute dictionary.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfKit.PascalToKebab(System.String)
member.summary: PascalCase → kebab-case (e.g. FontSize → font-size).

member.name: T:Lpdf.DocumentOptions
member.summary: Document-level attributes applied as defaults to every page.

member.name: M:Lpdf.DocumentOptions.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,Lpdf.LpdfTokens,Lpdf.LpdfMeta)
member.summary: Document-level attributes applied as defaults to every page.

member.name: T:Lpdf.LpdfTokens
member.summary: Design-token overrides applied to the whole document.
Design-token overrides applied to the whole document.

member.name: T:Lpdf.LpdfFont
member.summary: Abstract base for a font definition used in .

member.name: T:Lpdf.LpdfFontSrc
member.summary: Font loaded from a file path or URL supplied via .

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfFontSrc.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Font loaded from a file path or URL supplied via .

member.name: T:Lpdf.LpdfFontBuiltin
member.summary: One of the lpdf built-in fonts, referenced by name.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfFontBuiltin.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: One of the lpdf built-in fonts, referenced by name.

member.name: T:Lpdf.LpdfMeta
member.summary: PDF document metadata written into the output file.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfMeta.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: PDF document metadata written into the output file.

member.name: T:Lpdf.LpdfNode
member.summary: Discriminated union of all layout nodes. Use to construct.

member.name: P:Lpdf.LpdfNode.Type
member.summary: The lpdf element name (e.g. stack, text, page).

member.name: T:Lpdf.LpdfContent
member.summary: A text content item — either a raw string wrapped in or an .

member.name: T:Lpdf.LpdfRawText
member.summary: A plain-text run inside a text node. Implicitly convertible from .

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfRawText.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: A plain-text run inside a text node. Implicitly convertible from .

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfRawText.op_Implicit(System.String)~Lpdf.LpdfRawText
member.summary: Implicitly wrap a plain string as .

member.name: T:Lpdf.LpdfContainerNode
member.summary: A serialised layout container node (stack, flank, grid, etc.).

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfContainerNode.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{Lpdf.LpdfNode},System.String)
member.summary: A serialised layout container node (stack, flank, grid, etc.).

member.name: T:Lpdf.LpdfPageNode
member.summary: A serialised page node.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfPageNode.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{Lpdf.LpdfNode})
member.summary: A serialised page node.

member.summary: A serialised text paragraph node.

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfTextNode.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{Lpdf.LpdfContent})
member.summary: A serialised text paragraph node.

member.name: T:Lpdf.LpdfDocument
member.summary: Root document node — passed to .

member.name: M:Lpdf.LpdfDocument.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Collections.Generic.List{Lpdf.LpdfPageNode})
member.summary: Root document node — passed to .

member.name: P:Lpdf.LpdfDocument.Version
member.summary: Schema version; always 1.

member.name: P:Lpdf.LpdfDocument.Type
member.summary: Node type discriminator; always "document".

member.name: F:Lpdf.LpdfDocumentJson.Options
member.summary: Options used when serializing an to the WASM input JSON.

member.name: T:Lpdf.WasmRunner
member.summary: Thin wrapper around the Wasmtime.NET engine that loads the embedded lpdf.wasm WASI binary and exposes render/render_tree as synchronous string-in / string-out calls, and render_pdf / render_tree_pdf as calls that return raw PDF bytes.

member.name: M:Lpdf.WasmRunner.Render(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Render an lpdf XML document and return the RenderTree JSON string.

member.name: M:Lpdf.WasmRunner.RenderTree(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Render an lpdf JSON tree and return the RenderTree JSON string.

member.name: M:Lpdf.WasmRunner.RenderPdf(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Byte[]},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Byte[]},System.Func{System.String,System.Byte[]},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Render an lpdf XML document to raw PDF bytes. Custom fonts are base64-encoded into the request envelope. If is provided, a preliminary render call is made to discover font src paths so they can be resolved before the PDF render call.

member.name: M:Lpdf.WasmRunner.RenderTreePdf(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Byte[]},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Byte[]},System.Func{System.String,System.Byte[]},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Render an lpdf JSON document tree to raw PDF bytes.

member.name: M:Lpdf.WasmRunner.KitToXml(System.String)
member.summary: Convert a JSON kit-tree (produced by LpdfKit) to an lpdf XML string.

member.name: M:Lpdf.WasmRunner.ResolveAllFonts(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Byte[]},System.Func{System.String,System.Byte[]},System.Boolean)
member.summary: When is set, performs a preliminary render call to discover font src paths, then resolves them. Returns the merged font bytes dictionary.
